description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Thursday, March 26, new first-grade students in Hanno City received "randoseru covers" (backpack covers) from the Hanno City Traffic Safety Promotion Council and Hanno District Traffic Safety Association, as well as a traffic safety learning booklet called "Okeiko Land" (おけいこランド) for parents and children to study together, presented by Hanno Police Station and the Hanno District Traffic Safety Association.

These gifts will be used to help children commute to school safely. We express our gratitude to all those involved in making this happen.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13358.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Presentation of "Randoseru Covers" and Traffic Safety Booklet "Okeiko Land" to New First-Grade Students
